description.english: Enter the Hideout of the Underground Catacomb

displayName.french: Tous les ruisseaux vont à la mer

description.english: Bind memories to all memory slots of one character (excluding specific characters)

displayName.french: Le plus grand forgeron de Remore

description.english: Craft every type of weapon at least once

description.schinese: 制造所有种类的武器（各至少一次）
description.spanish: Forja todas las clases de armas una vez o más

description.english: Fully restore the Memolith Pillar in the hideout to maximum level
description.french: Restaurez au maximum le pilier du Mémolith situé dans la Cachette

description.english: Kill a Judge who hasn’t received damage with a single attack

description.spanish: Elimina a un Juez que no haya recibido daño con un solo ataque
